note: Explorer Phase 2 miner setup banner — OPTION A reworded to make explicit that the label is fully freeform. New first line: 'The label is yours to choose freely. Anything you can type works.' The only rule (the label must match between getnewaddress and --mining-key-label inside the same wallet) is now stated up front. Verified against src/sost-cli.cpp:1269 (getnewaddress takes argv[arg_start+1] as a plain string, no validation) and src/wallet.cpp:84 (find_key_by_label is a plain string compare). Added a second worked example using label 'home-rig' alongside the existing 'phase2-miner' example, both shown in full (newwallet → getnewaddress → listaddresses → backup → ./sost-miner launch). Both miner-launch commands shown back-to-back so the user can copy whichever one they prefer. Expected-startup-lines example updated to '<your-label>' so it is clear the echoed string mirrors the chosen label rather than the literal phase2-miner. NO consensus, NO RPC schema, NO node, NO miner, NO transaction wire format. Pure documentation banner edit.
